title: dispatch_peer_retract: soft-deletes message but emits no DaemonEvent to SSE/WS subscribers
description: daemon/src/relay.rs:552 dispatch_peer_retract calls store.soft_delete_message() but never broadcasts a DaemonEvent. All SSE/WebSocket clients have no real-time notification of message retraction. Every other mutating dispatch (deliver, receipt, typing) broadcasts a corresponding event. Fix: add DaemonEvent::MessageRetracted { message_id, for_all, timestamp } variant and broadcast it from dispatch_peer_retract after store succeeds.
